scenes.description: Opening montage with fan-made clips and the song 'Ai Ai Ai ♡ I Love You'.

scenes.description: A long sequence scrolling through hundreds of fan messages of support for the live event.
A waiting screen title card with live stream rules and start information.
A screen displaying the official sponsors for the concert.
